scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:wait: until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d wapp > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done
scripts.setup: cp .env apps/web/.env && cp .env packages/db/.env && pnpm docker:up && pnpm db:wait && pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push && pnpm db:seed
